final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing promotional poster for cross-border e-commerce sales, intended for social media advertising.

Style/medium: promotional poster with artistic typography, layered font composition
Composition: 16:9 aspect ratio, complex but organized layout with text layers overlapping and interweaving, products or main subjects partially obscuring some text elements
Subject: cross-border e-commerce promotional content with featured products or brand elements
Scene/backdrop: dynamic commercial backdrop supporting the layered text and product arrangement
Lighting/mood: energetic, promotional atmosphere balancing visual density with clarity
Color palette: vibrant promotional colors (red, orange, gold accents typical of sales campaigns)
Materials/textures: layered paper/cardstock feel for stacked typography, product photography textures
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include artistic typography, layered/stacked fonts, complex but not cluttered composition, products or subjects must partially block some text, 16:9 ratio
Avoid: chaotic clutter, illegible text, flat single-layer design, Western-only aesthetic ignoring cross-border context
